notableEvents.label: Ronald Acuña Jr. plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a force out, first baseman Jacob Gonzalez to shortstop Luisangel Acuña. Ozzie Albies scores. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Dominic Smith to 1st. Dominic Smith advances to 1st, on a missed catch error by pitcher Erick Fedde, assist to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, first baseman Jacob Gonzalez to shortstop Chase Meidroth to pitcher Tyler Davis. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, first baseman Jacob Gonzalez to shortstop Chase Meidroth to pitcher Tyler Davis. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jorge Mateo batting, Austin Riley picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Mateo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Mateo flies out to right fielder Braden Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Braden Montgomery homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Andrew Benintendi scores.
